title: U.N. Report Documents Sectarian Violence in Syria That Killed Over 1,700
summary_full: Investigators said the government of President Ahmed al-Sharaa had done little to address the extrajudicial killings and torture of Druse civilians in July 2025.
summary_public: Investigators said the government of President Ahmed al-Sharaa had done little to address the extrajudicial killings and torture of Druse civilians in July 2025.
